title: hoheria angustifolia
intro: Hoheria angustifolia, also known as Narrow-leaved Whau, is a flowering plant native to New Zealand. The leaves of the plant have been used in traditional medicine for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Hoheria angustifolia include its potential to reduce inflammation, soothe wounds, and treat various infections. The plant can be prepared as a tincture, infusion, or salve, making it a versatile herbal remedy for various health issues.
